channel.title: EU on Satyam Kapoor | Site Reliability Engineer based in Frankfurt, Germany
channel.description: Recent content in EU on Satyam Kapoor | Site Reliability Engineer based in Frankfurt, Germany

item.title: AI Generated Experiments – European Driving Resources
item.author: satyam@satyamkapoor.com (Satyam Kapoor)
item.description: One of my long-desired AI experiments: creating practical learning resources for Indians moving to Europe using Claude and Nemotron models.
